pillars.name: Market Segment Attractiveness
pillars.description: Segments with strongest investment tailwinds receive higher scores. Priority: Precision viticulture, Soil health, Carbon MRV.

pillars.name: Technology & Business Model
pillars.description: Software-driven and biotech models score highest. SaaS/Data platforms, Biotech, AI/Satellite analytics = 5.

pillars.name: Company Maturity
pillars.description: Team size used as stage proxy. Optimal: 50-100 employees (Series A-B, proven tech, still scalable).

pillars.name: Impact & ESG Alignment
pillars.description: Direct relevance to regenerative viticulture KPIs: carbon, soil health, water reduction, biodiversity.

pillars.name: Differentiation & Competitive Edge
pillars.description: Proprietary technology, IP, biological databases, AI models, unique datasets.
